analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet merely announces that EU foreign policy chief Josep Borrell spoke about Hong Kong and EU-US relations, without quoting content or expressing any evaluative stance. Evaluation per narrative: EU1 (EU successful story) – not supported; no claim about EU’s historical success. EU2 (EU united) – not supported; no mention of unity or agreement. EU3 (useful for citizens) – not supported; no policy benefits or citizen-focused outcomes. EU4 (avant-garde actor) – not supported; no claim of pioneering regulation or leadership. EU5 (global champion of fair causes) – not supported; although Hong Kong could imply rights issues, the tweet does not state any values-based stance. EU6 (contributes to a better world) – not supported; no assertion of global cooperation or multilateral contributions. Conclusion: No listed narratives are clearly promoted.
